narration: Define a variable named friends of type string array.
Specify the data type of the array as string.
Use square brackets to indicate array creation.
Give the array a name, for example 'friends'.
Initialize the array with values using curly brackets.
Separate multiple values in the array with commas.
Access individual elements using square brackets and an index.
Modify an element by assigning a new value to a specific index.
Use the length property to determine the number of elements in an array.
Create an array with a specified size using the 'new' keyword.
Populate the array by assigning values to specific indices.
Access the first element of the array.
Access the second element of the array.
Access the third element of the array.
